title: Robust Registration of Heterogeneous Point Clouds
abstract: Aligning airborne LiDAR with terrestrial mobile-mapping scans is hard when density and viewpoint differ wildly. This thesis develops a coarse-to-fine registration that uses learned local descriptors for the coarse step and a robust ICP variant for refinement, evaluated on Munich city data.

title: Lightweight SAR Despeckling on the Edge
abstract: Can a compact CNN despeckle SAR imagery fast enough to run on-board a small satellite? This project benchmarks pruned and quantised despeckling networks against quality and latency targets.

title: A Living Digital Twin of the TUM Campus
abstract: An interdisciplinary project building a continuously updated semantic 3D twin of the campus from repeated mobile-mapping runs, with a web viewer that highlights what changed between scans.
